description: CompositionRed striped and printed strappy top made of 100% cotton, with a crossover detail at the backFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightFresh from doodle's range of tops, myntra stocks the prettiest ones for your little one.
